channel.title: Code-Optimization on Abdulkadir Güngör
channel.description: Recent content in Code-Optimization on Abdulkadir Güngör

item.title: Single Responsibility and Micro-Modules: The Engineering Cost of Decomposing Classes
item.description: The balance between sustainability and scalability in software architecture often revolves around the question of how granular components should be. While the Single Responsibility Principle (SRP) advocates that a module or class should have only one reason to change, the extreme of this principle—Micro-Modules—reduces code to an atomic level. However, like every engineering decision, breaking classes into microscopic pieces carries costs such as abstraction complexity and runtime overhead.
